title: MyKhanWrites — Launch Board
subtitle: Everything still on Meher's side before go-live. The build is feature-complete; these are creds, assets, and sign-offs.

tasks.title: Hostinger access + deploy method
tasks.detail: Confirm SSH/SFTP or Git-deploy access and test the upload path for dist/. This is the deploy target.

tasks.title: Live hello@mykhanwrites.com inbox
tasks.detail: Mailbox created, live, and tested. Web3Forms delivers contact submissions here; it's also the obfuscated address shown on /contact, /screen, and the footer.

tasks.title: Kit form id (PUBLIC_KIT_FORM_ID)
tasks.detail: Create the Kit account + signup form, set double opt-in, and tags source:mykhanwrites / interest:novel-launch. Put the form id in .env / CI. LettersForm degrades to a disabled 'pending' state until set.

tasks.title: Web3Forms access key (PUBLIC_WEB3FORMS_ACCESS_KEY)
tasks.detail: Create the Web3Forms account, point it at the hello@ inbox, set the access key in .env / CI. ContactForm shows a graceful fallback until set.

tasks.title: Umami website id (PUBLIC_UMAMI_ID)
tasks.detail: Umami Cloud free tier; add the site, set the id in .env / CI, then verify all 7 custom events fire. Analytics is simply absent until set (no breakage).

tasks.title: File US Copyright for the screenplay (C4)
tasks.detail: HARD BLOCKER. Do NOT rebuild with SCREEN_PUBLISHED=true or un-gate /screen until the Copyright Office confirmation is in hand.

tasks.title: Fill /screen specifics (after C4 only)
tasks.detail: Once C4 is filed: fill screen.json logline/synopsis/themes/comps (honest [PENDING] now), screen.md SEO title+description, imdbProUrl, and review screen.bio. Then SCREEN_PUBLISHED=true.

tasks.title: Anti-template visual sign-off (C5)
tasks.detail: HARD BLOCKER. Eyes-on review at 380 / 768 / 1440 / large widths vs mockups/styleguide.html. Confirm it doesn't look templated/AI-generated; locked dusk palette; copy verbatim.

tasks.title: Crane + favicon redesign sign-off
tasks.detail: Approve (or replace) the current crane SVG used in the favicon, footer, and maintenance.html. Functional improvement awaiting your explicit go/no-go.

tasks.title: axe accessibility scan — 0 violations
tasks.detail: Run axe against the full-site build (all 5 routes + 404). Deferred in-session (no headless Chrome). Exact command + setup in the phase-12 report. `npm run verify:a11y`.

tasks.title: Lighthouse ≥ 90 (Perf / A11y / BP / SEO)
tasks.detail: Run Lighthouse CI on home + novel. .lighthouserc.json and the exact command are in the phase-12 report. Target ≥90 on all four categories.

tasks.title: Live external-link smoke test
tasks.detail: Internal links pass (`npm run verify:links`). Before launch, click through the real external links (Instagram, comparemydrafts.com, onlywhenitrains.com, ManTalksMedia) against the live site.

tasks.title: JSON-LD Rich Results validation
tasks.detail: Validate the Person (/about) and Book (/novel) JSON-LD with Google's Rich Results Test once the site is reachable.

tasks.title: /contact?reason=screen browser smoke test
tasks.detail: The reason-preselect (I1) fix is code-correct but unverified in a real browser. With a configured Web3Forms key, open /contact?reason=screen and confirm 'Film / screen' is pre-selected after the form hydrates.

tasks.title: Author photo
tasks.detail: Window-lit, muted, authentic. Warm/dark palette. No corporate headshot, no dark-room, no desk. Used on /about hero + homepage About preview.

tasks.title: Novel-hero image (4:5 + 16:9 crops)
tasks.detail: Japanese commuter-station/café at dusk, cinematic rainy. Portrait 4:5 + landscape 16:9. Warm interior light vs rain-grey; platform, doubling reflections. Used on /novel hero + home Novel bridge.

tasks.title: OG share image crop (1200×630)
tasks.detail: Crop from the final novel-hero. Replaces the on-brand placeholder in public/og/. Must be exactly 1200×630.

tasks.title: Chapter 1 PDF + Kit welcome wiring
tasks.detail: 'The Night It Started' PDF hosted on Kit or a CDN; the URL goes into the Kit welcome automation that delivers on signup.

tasks.title: Early-reader quotes
tasks.detail: Genuine early-reader quotes only — never placeholder or AI. Add to src/data/novel.json quotes[]; the slot stays empty (no fabrication) until then.

tasks.title: TikTok link (@mykhanwrites)
tasks.detail: Add the URL to src/data/site.json social links when the account is live. X stays reserved — do NOT link.

tasks.title: Final book cover
tasks.detail: Replace the placeholder cover slot on /novel when the final cover art is delivered. Possible secondary OG use.

tasks.title: Author-hero texture / background
tasks.detail: Dark charcoal field, optional restrained film-grain, warm. No writer's-desk photo. Homepage hero dark background.

tasks.title: Decide: plaintext hello@ in fallback copy
tasks.detail: site.json web3formsPending / newsletterError embed the raw hello@ address (only shown in the degraded no-key state). Deliberately public, but defeats obfuscation there. Keep as-is, or have me render it obfuscated?

tasks.title: Decide: normalize short label literals
tasks.detail: A few short labels live in components rather than data (eyebrow 'Meher Yar Khan · Writer', H1s 'About'/'Contact'/'For industry'). Reviewer: arguably acceptable structural labels. Leave, or move into data for strict all-copy-in-data?
